problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: Combining Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.
